---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with a skill, script, or repository standard
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Summary

Describe the issue clearly.

## Location

List the affected file paths or skill names.

## Expected Behavior

Explain what should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

Explain what actually happened.

## Reproduction

Provide the smallest reproducible input or sequence of steps.
